description: The 'Ndrina Nicoscia is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Isola Capo Rizzuto, Calabria, Italy. It is allied with the Grande Aracri and Russelli clans and operates in several Italian regions, including Emilia-Romagna and Lombardy. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and other criminal activities, and has been targeted by multiple police operations such as Scacco Matto and Isola.
